ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Here at Harbor Market and while on negotiating duty, I can work with listen carefully give huge<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>3<TATAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses are contextually relevant but lack some naturalness in phrasing.

The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency as an Old Merchant who does not cheat but also seeks profit, and has a natural tone. However, the overall quality could be improved by offering some flexibility in pricing due to player's urgency without compromising on fairness or integrity.
